| Export | Role |
|---|---|

| `StepperTrigger` | `<button>` that navigates on click. Auto-renders a numbered circle (or ✓ icon when completed) using `IconPlaceholder`. Disabled when `linear` blocks the target step |

Horizontal mode: `basis-full w-full` (new flex row below all triggers). Vertical mode: `ms-11` indented to align with the trigger text column |
| `useStepper` / `useStepperItem` | Hook escapes for custom extensions |

Step ordering is determined by `useLayoutEffect` registration, which fires in DOM order before the first paint (React 18 automatic batching collapses all sibling registrations into one re-render).
